category_sources: Official docs describe httpYac as a system to create, execute, and store HTTP requests with CLI support for CI.
source_facts.description says httpyac sends REST, SOAP, GraphQL and gRPC requests.
display_name_sources: Official documentation stylizes the display name as httpYac.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official httpYac documentation site, and the official guide is https://httpyac.github.io/guide/.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository AnWeber/httpyac describes the command-line interface and links to httpyac.github.io.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from official httpYac docs and GitHub results.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository describes support for HTTP, gRPC, WebSocket and MQTT; official docs describe CLI and VS Code request execution.
source_facts.description lists REST, SOAP, GraphQL and gRPC requests.
